patterns.name: aws_access_key_id
patterns.description: AWS Access Key ID starting with AKIA

patterns.name: aws_secret_access_key
patterns.description: AWS Secret Access Key (40-character base64-like string)

patterns.name: azure_subscription_key
patterns.description: Azure Subscription Key (32-character hex string)

patterns.name: gcp_api_key
patterns.description: Google Cloud Platform API Key starting with AIza

patterns.name: gcp_oauth_token
patterns.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Access Token starting with ya29

patterns.name: github_personal_token
patterns.description: GitHub Personal Access Token starting with ghp_

patterns.name: gitlab_personal_token
patterns.description: GitLab Personal Access Token starting with glpat-

patterns.name: bitbucket_app_password
patterns.description: Bitbucket App Password with username suffix

patterns.name: slack_bot_token
patterns.description: Slack Bot Token starting with xoxb-

patterns.name: slack_user_token
patterns.description: Slack User Token starting with xoxp-

patterns.name: stripe_live_key
patterns.description: Stripe Live Secret Key starting with sk_live_

patterns.name: stripe_test_key
patterns.description: Stripe Test Secret Key starting with sk_test_

patterns.name: jwt_token
patterns.description: JSON Web Token (JWT) in standard format

patterns.name: bearer_token
patterns.description: Bearer token in Authorization header

patterns.name: oauth_access_token
patterns.description: OAuth 2.0 Access Token (20+ alphanumeric characters)

patterns.name: basic_auth
patterns.description: Basic Authentication header with base64 credentials

patterns.name: generic_api_key
patterns.description: Generic API key pattern (api_key, api-key, apikey followed by value)

patterns.name: private_key
patterns.description: Private key in PEM format (RSA or generic)

patterns.name: database_connection_string
patterns.description: Database connection string with embedded credentials

patterns.name: password_in_code
patterns.description: Password assignment in code (password = value)
